title: build(deps): bump github.com/containers/buildah from 1.29.1-0.20230201192322-e56eb25575c7 to 1.30.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/buildah](https://github.com/containers/buildah) from 1.29.1-0.20230201192322-e56eb25575c7 to 1.30.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/buildah's releases.

v1.30.0

What's Changed

  • Bump 1.29.0 by @â€‹TomSweeneyRedHat in containers/buildah#4542
  • docs: specify order preference for FROM when using multiple containerfiles by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4546
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/containerd from 1.6.15 to 1.6.16 by @â€‹dependabot in containers/buildah#4545
  • build(deps): bump go.etcd.io/bbolt from 1.3.6 to 1.3.7 by @â€‹dependabot in containers/buildah#4548
  • conformance: use scratch for minimal test and unblock CI by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4552
  • pkg/parse: expose public CleanCacheMount API by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4550
  • login: support interspersed args for password from stdin by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4558
  • Run codespell on codebase by @â€‹rhatdan in containers/buildah#4571
  • build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.5.0 to 0.6.0 by @â€‹dependabot in containers/buildah#4569
  • [CI:DOCS] Configure Renovate by @â€‹renovate in containers/buildah#4567
  • [skip-ci] Update tim-actions/get-pr-commits digest to 55b867b by @â€‹renovate in containers/buildah#4581
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containers/image/v5 from 5.24.0 to 5.24.1 by @â€‹dependabot in containers/buildah#4575
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.10.2 to 1.11.0 by @â€‹dependabot in containers/buildah#4570
  • build(deps): bump tim-actions/get-pr-commits from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0 by @â€‹dependabot in containers/buildah#4586
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/containerd from 1.6.16 to 1.6.17 by @â€‹dependabot in containers/buildah#4580
  • fix(deps): update github.com/openshift/imagebuilder digest to 86828bf by @â€‹renovate in containers/buildah#4587
  • Temporarily hard-skip bud-multiple-platform-values test by @â€‹edsantiago in containers/buildah#4596
  • [CI:DOCS] Skip subject-length validation for renovate PRs by @â€‹cevich in containers/buildah#4598
  • [CI:DOCS] Fix documentation on which Capabilities are allowed by default by @â€‹rhatdan in containers/buildah#4584
  • [CI:BUILD] copr: fix el8 builds by @â€‹lsm5 in containers/buildah#4439
  • executor: also add stage with no children to cleanupStages and ensure no dangling containers are left. by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4595
  • imagebuildah.StageExecutor: suppress bogus "Pushing cache []:..." messages by @â€‹nalind in containers/buildah#4602
  • docs/tutorials/04: add defaults for Run() by @â€‹nalind in containers/buildah#4611
  • Vendor in latest containers/common by @â€‹rhatdan in containers/buildah#4617
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.45.3 to 1.45.4 by @â€‹dependabot in containers/buildah#4624
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient to v1.9.5 by @â€‹renovate in containers/buildah#4622
  • Ignore the base image's base image annotations by @â€‹nalind in containers/buildah#4618
  • Vendor in latest containers/(common, storage, image) by @â€‹rhatdan in containers/buildah#4633
  • executor,copy: honor default ARG value while eval stage in COPY stmts by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4578
  • executor: don't warn about unused TARGETARCH,TARGETOS,TARGETPLATFORM by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4634
  • [CI:DOCS] Fix tutorial for rootless mode by @â€‹Steffen1989 in containers/buildah#4629
  • sshagent: use ExtendedAgent instead of Agent by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4637
  • fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/term to v0.6.0 by @â€‹renovate in containers/buildah#4641
  • [CI:DOCS] build: document behaviour of buildah's distributed cache by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4644
  • Add default list of capabilities required to run buildah in a container by @â€‹rhatdan in containers/buildah#4643
  • Add "ifnewer" as option in help message for pull command by @â€‹mathiasgredal in containers/buildah#4645
  • stage_executor,cache-to: attempt to push cache only when cacheKey is valid by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4650
  • run: add support for inline --network in RUN statements by @â€‹flouthoc in containers/buildah#4566
  • Replace Ubuntu -> Debian SID by @â€‹cevich in containers/buildah#4610
  • Re-enable conformance tests by @â€‹nalind in containers/buildah#4665
  • Vendor in latest containers/(storage, common, image) by @â€‹rhatdan in containers/buildah#4668
  • Fix requiring tests on Makefile changes by @â€‹cevich in containers/buildah#4663
  • chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230314 by @â€‹renovate in containers/buildah#4664
  • [CI:DOCS] Disable dependabot in favor of renovate by @â€‹cevich in containers/buildah#4670
  • Update to Go 1.18 by @â€‹mtrmac in containers/buildah#4662
  • imagebuildah: set len(short_image_id) to 12 by @â€‹danishprakash in containers/buildah#4660
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient to v1.9.6 by @â€‹renovate in containers/buildah#4649
  • [CI:BUILD] Packit: Enable Copr builds on PR and commit to main by @â€‹lsm5 in containers/buildah#4681

... (truncated)

Changelog

Sourced from github.com/containers/buildah's changelog.

v1.30.0 (2023-04-06)

fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.1.5
fix(deps): update module github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient to v1.9.7
buildah image should not enable fuse-overlayfs for rootful mode
stage_executor: inline network add default string
fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/common to v0.51.2
chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230330
fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/docker to v23.0.2+incompatible
chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230320
fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/gomega to v1.27.6
fix(deps): update github.com/opencontainers/runtime-tools digest to e931285
[skip-ci] Update actions/stale action to v8
test: don't allow to override io.buildah.version
executor: only apply label on the final stage
Update docs/buildah-build.1.md
update build instruction for Ubuntu
code review
build: accept arguments from file with --build-arg-file
run_linux: Update heuristic for mounting /sys
[CI:BUILD] Packit: Enable Copr builds on PR and commit to main
fix(deps): update module github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient to v1.9.6
Update to Go 1.18
Disable dependabot in favor of renovate
chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230314
Fix requiring tests on Makefile changes
Vendor in latest containers/(storage, common, image)
imagebuildah: set len(short_image_id) to 12
Re-enable conformance tests
Skip conformance test failures with Docker 23.0.1
Cirrus: Replace Ubuntu -> Debian SID
run: add support for inline --network in RUN stmt
vendor: bump imagebuilder to a3c3f8358ca31b1e4daa6
stage_executor: attempt to push cache only when cacheKey is valid
Add "ifnewer" as option in help message for pull command
build: document behaviour of buildah's distributed cache
fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/term to v0.6.0
Add default list of capabilities required to run buildah in a container
executor,copy: honor default ARG value while eval stage
sshagent: use ExtendedAgent instead of Agent
tests/bud: remove unwated test
executor: do not warn on builtin default args
executor: don't warn about unused TARGETARCH,TARGETOS,TARGETPLATFORM
Fix tutorial for rootless mode
Vendor in latest containers/(common, storage, image)
Ignore the base image's base image annotations
fix(deps): update module github.com/fsouza/go-dockerclient to v1.9.5
build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.45.3 to 1.45.4
Vendor in latest containers/common
docs/tutorials/04: add defaults for Run()

... (truncated)

Commits
  • See full diff in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/containers/buildah&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.29.1-0.20230201192322-e56eb25575c7&new-version=1.30.0)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dependabot[bot]* **Once this PR has been reviewed and has the lgtm label**, please assign edsantiago for approval. For more information see [the Kubernetes Code Review Process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process). The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

OK, I won't notify you again about this release, but will get in touch when a new version is available. If you'd rather skip all updates until the next major or minor version, let me know by commenting `@dependabot ignore this major version` or `@dependabot ignore this minor version`. You can also ignore all major, minor, or patch releases for a dependency by adding an [`ignore` condition](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/supply-chain-security/configuration-options-for-dependency-updates#ignore) with the desired `update_types` to your config file.

If you change your mind, just re-open this PR and I'll resolve any conflicts on it.
